calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brett Lytle for Benjamin marcello and Faith Marcello.
Ryan Patrick for and with Michael Kasolas.

Mr. Little addressed the issue raised with respect to the original bank statements making reference to the local rules that allow the parties to file a declaration indicating that they will be holding the original statements for five years. Mr. Patrick stated that he submitted time records for Mr. Kasolas' invoice and that he does not understand what the "alert fee" means. Mr. Kasolas explained that each time they go out they are required to take photographs, that this was a re-appraisal for sale, that they went out twice, that they are required to provide photos and maps, and that they are allowed to charge for them. The Petition to Close Insolvent Estate, etc. is under submission. Mr. Little was told to file the original bank statements at the Clerk's filing window.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions To Co-Administrators Of Insolvent Estate For Authorization To Withhold Payment On All Liens At Sale Of Real Property; Authorization To Engage Michael Kasolas, Cpa To Sell Real Estate And To Act As A Referee For Allocation And Payment Of Expenses Of Administration And Creditors Claims And To Be Absolved From Conflict Of Interest While Acting
Off Calendar May-01-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Probate Continuation Calendar.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen. Proceedings not reported.

Brett Steven Lytle, Esq., appearing for Petitioners Benjamin Paul Ilumin Marcelo and Evangeline-Faith De Los Reyes Marcelo.
No other appearances. No objections made.
Petitioner's Motion re: INSTRUCTION CO-ADMINISTRATORS OF INSOLVENT ESTATE TO WITHHOLD PAYMENT ON ALL LIENS AT SALE OF REAL PROPERTY; TO ENGAGE MICHAEL KASOLAS, CPA TO SELL REAL ESTATE, TO ACT AS REFEREE FOR ALLOCATION AND PAYMENT OF EXPENSES OF ADINISTRATION AND CREDITOR'S CLAIMS (PC 11420); AND THAT HE BE ABSOLVED FROM CONFLICT OF INTEREST WHILE ACTING is heard on this day.
After Evidence and Argument, the Court granted motion and signed Order Granting INSTRUCTION CO-ADMINISTRATORS OF INSOLVENT ESTATE TO WITHHOLD PAYMENT ON ALL LIENS AT SALE OF REAL PROPERTY; TO ENGAGE MICHAEL KASOLAS, CPA TO SELL REAL ESTATE, TO ACT AS REFEREE FOR ALLOCATION AND PAYMENT OF EXPENSES OF ADINISTRATION AND CREDITOR'S CLAIMS (PC 11420); AND THAT HE BE ABSOLVED FROM CONFLICT OF INTEREST WHILE ACTING
Order signed in open court.
